main.description: A named, game-specific progress indicator (eg. health, gold, kills, score), accurate at the play record's `updatedAt` timestamp, for use in a play record's `state` array. Cardinality: keyed — unique per ($type, id); writers upsert by `id`.

id.description: Stable, game-defined camelCase identifier for this metric (eg. `stagesCleared`). Language-independent and consistent across play-throughs & game versions.

name.description: Human-readable display name in the locale active at write time. Optional, but recommended so renderers without a localised mapping of `id` can fall back to displaying this.

value.description: The metric's current value. The atproto data model has no floating-point numbers; use `scale` for fixed-point values.

scale.description: Power-of-ten divisor for fixed-point values: the real value is `value / 10^scale` (eg. value=1234, scale=2 → 12.34). Omit for plain integers.

items.description: Game-specific lexicons that can hold additional information about this metric.
